title: Find a comparable transaction set to support a multiple
guidance: Reward relevant comps with a fit note. Penalise sector-only or cherry-picked comps.

runner_input.instruction: Provide 3 comparable transactions supporting the stated exit multiple.
runner_input.constraints: 3 comps. State EV/ARR or EV/EBITDA. One-line fit note each (moat type + growth/margin).

source_blocks.text: Halden FY31F plan: £14.2m Adj. EBITDA, 36% margin, 28% CAGR, compliance-anchored vertical SaaS. A claimed ~12x EBITDA / ~9x ARR exit is asserted, lightly justified. Provide a comparable set (synthetic or anonymised) that supports or challenges it, matching on moat type and growth/margin, not just 'software'.

rubric_notes: Comps must match compliance-moated vertical SaaS at similar Rule-of-40, not generic SaaS.
A good answer notes whether 12x is top-of-range or mid for that cohort.
